verdict.moderator_pairing_notes: The moderator correctly identified a full consensus among all five agents in Round 1. Terminating the process immediately was the optimal decision, as no disagreement existed to resolve.
verdict.judge_synthesis_notes: The judge correctly synthesized the unanimous agreement from the agents, prioritizing the high-confidence linguistic and regulatory evidence (Arabic/French mix, yellow taxis) to confirm the ground truth of Tunisia.
